examples.question: Mua 1 airpods giao Ha Noi, tong bao nhieu VND?
examples.ideal_answer: AirPods het hang. Khong the dat mua. (no Tong cong line)

examples.question: Mua 2 ipad dung ma SALE15 giao Da Nang, tong cong?
examples.ideal_answer: Use check_stock, get_discount, calc_shipping once each. Compute exactly. End: Tong cong: <integer> VND
